title: Use cases | Anybuild
description: How teams use Anybuild for finance, CRM, operations, and industry-specific platforms: model-driven systems that evolve over time.

hero.copyHtml: Teams use Anybuild to model requirements, ship production systems, and evolve them without rebuilding from scratch.

cases.title: Finance automation
cases.copy: Automate invoice processing, reconciliation, reporting, and approvals. Reduce month-end close cycles with full audit trails and compliance governance built in.

cases.title: Sales & CRM
cases.copy: Deploy a CRM that reflects your actual sales motion, pipeline management, forecasting, and customer intelligence on the same model as operations.
outcomes: Lead to invoice in one system

cases.title: Operations & workflows
cases.copy: Connect procurement, inventory, fulfilment, and service in one governed system. Eliminate handoff delays and create visibility across the operation.

cases.title: Industry-specific platforms
cases.copy: Build purpose-built vertical systems for logistics, professional services, manufacturing, or compliance, without generic software compromises.

cases.title: Custom line-of-business apps
cases.copy: Start from a spec, shape the model, and generate a working application with security, workflows, and reporting ready from day one.

cases.title: ERP/CRM modernisation
cases.copy: Replace fragmented tools with Onedb Smartsuite on the Anybuild platform, or extend Smartsuite with integrated line-of-business applications.

sectionCta.title: See how Anybuild fits your use case
sectionCta.copyHtml: Book a walkthrough tailored to your team, or try the platform free.
